FIntLuaAppEdpVideoAvailableRamThresholdM.mechanism: Sets a limit on the amount of RAM available for video applications in Lua.
FIntLuaAppEdpVideoAvailableRamThresholdM.purpose: Ensures smoother video playback by preventing excessive memory usage.

FFlagEnableSignUpExitModal3.mechanism: Activates a new modal window that appears when users try to exit the signup process.
FFlagEnableSignUpExitModal3.purpose: Encourages users to complete their signup by reminding them of the benefits.

FFlagMicroprofilerThreadSizeV1.purpose: Improves performance tracking, helping developers optimize games better.

DFFlagHlsCheckInitSegReady.purpose: Enhances video streaming reliability, reducing buffering for players.

FIntEdpStoreClicksDetectorThrottlingHund.purpose: Improves store performance and responsiveness for players.

DFIntGetProductInfoGamepassCacheSecs_Pla.purpose: Improves the speed of retrieving gamepass info, making the experience smoother for players.

FFlagVoiceSendTimeStampInReliabilityEven.purpose: Enhances voice chat stability, ensuring clearer communication during gameplay.

FFlagRbxStorageAltInitDuration.mechanism: Adjusts the initialization duration for storage services.
FFlagRbxStorageAltInitDuration.purpose: Reduces loading times for game assets, leading to a faster and more responsive game experience.

FFlagVoiceNullCheckForTimeStamp.mechanism: Checks for null values in timestamps during voice events to prevent errors.
FFlagVoiceNullCheckForTimeStamp.purpose: Improves the reliability of voice chat, minimizing disruptions during conversations.

FFlagGraphicsTextureCopyFixGL_Staged.mechanism: Fixes issues with copying textures in graphics rendering.
FFlagGraphicsTextureCopyFixGL_Staged.purpose: Enhances visual quality and performance, leading to a better graphical experience for players.

FFlagVoiceSendTimeStampInReliabilityEven.mechanism: Adds a timestamp to voice message reliability events for better tracking.
FFlagVoiceSendTimeStampInReliabilityEven.purpose: Improves the reliability of voice chat by allowing better monitoring of message delivery.

FFlagExpChatTranslationToggleSpacingFix.mechanism: Fixes spacing issues in translated chat messages when toggling translation.
FFlagExpChatTranslationToggleSpacingFix.purpose: Enhances readability of chat messages for players using translation features.

FFlagEnableEdpStoreClicksLogging3_Staged.mechanism: Logs clicks on store items to analyze player interactions.
FFlagEnableEdpStoreClicksLogging3_Staged.purpose: Helps improve the in-game store experience by understanding player behavior.

FFlagVideoCaptureWallTimeTimeout.mechanism: Sets a timeout for video capture processes to prevent them from hanging.
FFlagVideoCaptureWallTimeTimeout.purpose: Ensures smoother video capture functionality for players, reducing crashes.

FFlagLuaAppEdpBackendV2LogFetchSuccessAn.purpose: Improves the stability and performance of Lua apps by tracking data retrieval issues.

FFlagNewFindReplaceTasker4_Staged.purpose: Helps developers quickly update their scripts, making game development faster and easier.
